programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches a variety of short game shots and the best time to use them; using hybrids, mid irons, wedges and putter to shave strokes around the green.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the skills showcased by the top players in the Ryder Cup; five main factors for improving iron play contact and tips for finding the fairway on pressure-packed drives.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake helps with making a better backswing; drills and exercises to prevent swaying, excessive dipping, fanning the club face open and more of the biggest backswing faults.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is hitting the course to teach how to go low in the scoring zone; wedge swing keys used by Annika Sorenstam, cutting edge research on optimum trajectory and drills for controlling distance.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is wrapping the season with drills and exercises; tips to gain more distance off the tee, make solid contact with fairway woods and stop coming over the top.
